title: Create : Give My Arm Back
description: noticed that Create netherite backtank covers up your POV arm? this simply disables that. that it.
body:
## Create : Give My Arm Back
Create has netherite backtank covers up the players arm in POV, this overrides most mod that also add visuals there like [accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) related stuff. 

this simply disables that. that it.

also have compatibility with [Create Stuff & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions), disabling ExoSkeleton and Jetpack POV arms.

also i did not add a toggle for this, i mean you did download this, it literally does nothing else.

---
## wha- Why?

i wanted to make my own minimal armor texture pack for those armors, apparently making them just invisible didnt work which lead me down this rabbit hole.
